mapper.select: SELECT game_id, season_year, game_date, game_datetime, stadium, home_team_code, home_team_name, home_score, home_starter, home_emblem_url, away_team_code, away_team_name, away_score, away_starter, away_emblem_url, winner, win_pitcher, lose_pitcher, status_code, status_info, canceled, suspended FROM kbo_games WHERE game_date = #{gameDate} AND canceled = 0 ORDER BY game_datetime ASC

SELECT game_id, season_year, game_date, game_datetime, stadium, home_team_code, home_team_name, home_score, home_starter, home_emblem_url, away_team_code, away_team_name, away_score, away_starter, away_emblem_url, winner, win_pitcher, lose_pitcher, status_code, status_info, canceled, suspended FROM kbo_games WHERE game_id = #{gameId}

SELECT CASE WHEN home_team_code = #{teamCode} AND winner = 'HOME' THEN 'W' WHEN home_team_code = #{teamCode} AND winner = 'AWAY' THEN 'L' WHEN away_team_code = #{teamCode} AND winner = 'AWAY' THEN 'W' WHEN away_team_code = #{teamCode} AND winner = 'HOME' THEN 'L' ELSE 'D' END FROM kbo_games WHERE (home_team_code = #{teamCode} OR away_team_code = #{teamCode}) AND status_code = 'RESULT' AND game_date < #{gameDate} ORDER BY game_date DESC LIMIT 5
